no: Expansion of the Imnesvale village PARSE ERRORS (non-fatal, all difficulties): 10 errors across 6 BAF scripts — all reference CLERIC_RESIST_COLD which doesn't exist in EE Spell.IDS. In EE, Resist Fire/Cold is a single spell (CLERIC_RESIST_FIRE / SPPR213 covers both). The cold-resist pre-buff calls silently fail but CLERIC_RESIST_FIRE already grants both resistances, so no gameplay impact.
sum: Tactical combat encounters in Imnesvale after returning from the Underdark. Marauding invaders attack the village. Choose difficulty level.

co.no: 60s prep time, 4 spawns, limited boss triggers.
45s prep time, 9 spawns, some triggers enabled.

co.tp2n: Are You Out Of Your Freaking Mind?!
co.no: 30s prep time, endless spawns, all triggers active.
